Efficacy Charts:

Testing ex00_helloworld.adl:
With CMSOD
CLA ./cms_opendata_ttbar.root CMSOD -i ex00_helloworld.adl -e 1000 -v 500
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe /home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/runs/tutorials/cms_opendata_ttbar.root -inp CMSOD -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -S 0 w
With ATLASOD
CLA ./atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root ATLASOD -i ex00_helloworld.adl -e 1000 -v 500
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe /home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/runs/tutorials/atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root -inp ATLASOD -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -S 0 w
With DELPHES
CLA ./delphes_events_ttbar.root DELPHES -i ex00_helloworld.adl -e 1000 -v 500
/home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/CLA/CLA.exe /home/runner/work/CutLang/CutLang/runs/tutorials/delphes_events_ttbar.root -inp DELPHES -BP 1 -EVT 1000 -V 500 -ST 0 -S 0 w
					 --> Overall efficiency	 =      0 % +-      0 %
With CMSOD
python3 CLA.py ./cms_opendata_ttbar.root CMSOD -i ex00_helloworld.adl -e 1000 -v 500
With ATLASOD
python3 CLA.py ./atla_opendata_had_ttbar.root ATLASOD -i ex00_helloworld.adl -e 1000 -v 500
With DELPHES
python3 CLA.py ./delphes_events_ttbar.root DELPHES -i ex00_helloworld.adl -e 1000 -v 500
